name: JdV by Hyatt

current_snapshot.franchise_fee_headline: Greater of $100,000 or $400 per guest room

economics.franchise_fee_raw: Greater of $100,000 or $400 per guest room

validation_questions: Confirm Item 19 cohort size and definition with franchisor.
Confirm current auditor and most recent audit opinion.

internal_unresolveds.reason: Franchised vs owned/managed RevPAR gap ($109.83 vs $176.21 — 38% lower) is unexplained
One franchised hotel had only 2.1% WOH revenue and 4 WOH room nights — nature unclear
$110M goodwill impairment in management/franchising segment — unclear if JdV brand affected
Franchisor entity has $144.8M 'franchise agreement assets constituting payments to customers' — nature not fully explained
Item 12 uses 'Area of Protection' language while simultaneously disclaiming exclusivity ('you will not receive an exclusive territory')
Cover page states $279,406–$1,119,942 paid to franchisor/affiliate, but Item 7 contains many additional line items payable to 'Us' or 'Hyatt Corporation'
